headline: Bunge Schedules First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
summary: ST. LOUIS, March 31, 2026--Bunge Global SA (NYSE: BG) will announce its results for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, on Wednesday, April 29, 2026, prior to the market opening.

headline: Real Yields, Oil, Conflict Scenarios
summary: The ongoing Iran-Israel-US war, its potential duration, and implications for investors. Expert analysis and investment strategies from James Kostohryz.
